memberdef.argsstring: (CKTokenizer *tok, int32_t left, int32_t right, int32_t merged, int32_t priority)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_add_merge

detaileddescription.para: Add special token (UNK, BOS, EOS, PAD, MASK).

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTokenizer *tok, const char *token, int32_t id, float score)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_add_token

memberdef.argsstring: (const CKTokenizer *tok, const int32_t *ids, int num_ids, char *text, int max_len)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_decode

memberdef.argsstring: (const CKTokenizer *tok, const char *text, int text_len, int32_t *ids, int max_ids)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_encode

detaileddescription.para: Encode text to token IDs using greedy longest-match.
For BPE: applies merge rules iteratively. For WordPiece/SPM: greedy longest-match from vocabulary.

memberdef.argsstring: (const CKTokenizer *tok, const char *text, int text_len, int32_t *ids, int max_ids)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_encode_spm_impl

memberdef.argsstring: (const CKTokenizer *tok, const char *text, int text_len, int32_t *ids, int max_ids)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_encode_spm_llama_impl

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTokenizer *tok, int vocab_size, const int32_t *offsets, const char *strings, int num_merges, const int32_t *merges)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_load_binary

detaileddescription.para: Load vocabulary from memory-mapped binary data.

parameterdescription.para: Array of offsets into strings pool
Merge rules as (left, right, merged) triplets

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTokenizer *tok, int vocab_size, const int32_t *offsets, const char *strings, const float *scores, const uint8_t *types, int num_merges, const int32_t *merges)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_load_binary_with_scores

detaileddescription.para: Load vocabulary from memory-mapped binary data with scores and types.
This extended version supports SPM (SentencePiece) tokenizers which require token scores for Viterbi/DP encoding.

parameterdescription.para: Array of offsets into strings pool
Array of token scores (float32), can be NULL
Array of token types (uint8), can be NULL
Merge rules as (left, right, merged) triplets

detaileddescription.para: Load vocabulary from JSON file (HuggingFace format).
Load BPE merges from text file.
Format: token1 token2 (one merge per line)
Load vocabulary from text file (one token per line).
Format: token_string [id] [score] Lines starting with # are comments.

memberdef.argsstring: (CKTokenizer *tok, int32_t unk, int32_t bos, int32_t eos, int32_t pad, int32_t mask)
